top_signals.title: Trump's Oman outburst throws 'Switzerland of the Middle East' into the spotlight
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration has threatened sanctions and military action against Oman, a longtime ally and close security partner.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Exchange of letters between the Governor and the Chancellor regarding CPI Inflation - April 2026
top_signals.summary: Exchange of letters between the Governor and the Chancellor
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Trump is pushing Canada and Mexico towards China - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Trump is pushing Canada and Mexico towards China  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gemini crypto exchange launches AI data feed powered by Grok
top_signals.summary: The move comes as Gemini continues to expand beyond spot crypto trading into derivatives, predictions, and other financial services.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: ‘First and only’: Paxos secures SEC registration as clearing and settlement agency
top_signals.summary: Paxos said it is the first and only blockchain-native firm to be registered as a clearing agency under the SEC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent reiterates ‘no CBDC’ commitment under Trump admin
top_signals.summary: During a Thursday press briefing, Bessent also urged the House and the Senate to get the Clarity Act to the finish line.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
